scripts.demo:start: npm run demo:seed && concurrently -n server,client-a,client-b,dashboard "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client -- --dev=devA --workspace=./packages/demo/workspace-devA" "npm run dev -w packages/client -- --dev=devB --workspace=./packages/demo/workspace-devB" "npm run dev -w packages/dashboard"
